Description: Mechanical switch for manual touch-off height sensing.

Description: Form-fitting cradle for the Ambient Light Sensor that holds the sensing surface in its rated orientation. Snap-fit retention so it can be removed for calibration without tools.

Name: Illumination LED Mount
Description: Per-position bracket for the Illumination LED with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

Description: Per-position bracket for the UV-C Sterilization LED with M3 mounting holes matched to its bolt pattern. Rated for the actuator's continuous torque/load class.

Name: High-CRI Reference LED

Name: LED Control MOSFET
